listitem.para: * x = independent variables matrix (nobs x nvar)
* warn = any input if you do not want a warning to be displayed when the matrix is extremely ill-conditionned

refentry.refsection: DESCRIPTION Computes BKW COND index of a x matrix (with variables studentized to achieve invariance with respect to their scale). Contrary to bkw_scale, this function does not provide the variance-decomposition matrix.

refsection.title: EXAMPLE
